sprint.goal: Harden enforcement runtime — fix all P0/P1 governance bugs before dogfood run
sprint.focus: Security correctness: P0 COMPLETE, P1 #28 in PR #86, test coverage (#68) and classifyShellRisk (#63) assigned to qa-agent

p1.title: bug: bounded-execution policy timeout (300s) is silently overridden to 60s in shell execution
bug: classifyShellRisk prefix matching too broad — false read-only classification
test: zero test coverage across all packages

p2.title: bug: scheduler.go silently ignores os.WriteFile error
bug: dead code in flattenParams() overwrites result before using it
bug: filepath.Glob with ** in cmdScan never matches any Go files
Dogfood: run ShellForge swarm on jared box via RunPod GPU
bug: run() helper in main.go silently ignores command errors
bug: kernel version comparison in setup.sh is lexicographic, not numeric
bug: InferenceQueue is not priority-aware despite being documented as such
bug: run-qa-agent.sh and run-report-agent.sh don't build binary if missing
bug: agent RunResult.Success heuristic is incorrect
bug: listFiles() returns paths relative to cwd, not the listed directory

p3.title: feat: OpenClaw as governed execution runtime in ShellForge
[research] nono — kernel-enforced agent sandbox via macOS Seatbelt
[research] lean-ctx — 88% token reduction via shell hook + MCP server
[research] omlx — SSD KV caching doubles swarm capacity
[research] RTK integration — 70-90% token savings for agent runs

pr_queue.title: fix(governance): honour policy timeout in shell execution — remove 60s cap (#28)

capability_gaps: No dev-agent in swarm — P0/P1 bugs require EM to author fixes directly
blockers: PR #86 (P1 timeout fix): CI pending, review BLOCKED — GitHub prevents self-approval. Requires human review from @jpleva91.
Dogfood (#76): unblocked by P0 merge but no assignee yet — needs human trigger.
notes: Run 6 (2026-03-30T00:45Z): PRs #83/#84/#85 all merged — P0 COMPLETE. Issue #59 closed (was already fixed by #83). PR #86 opened for last P1 (#28, timeout override). PR budget 1/3. Sprint goal nearly achieved — remaining P1s are #28 (in PR), #63/#68 (qa-agent). Dogfood run (#76) is unblocked from governance side but needs human to trigger.
